block_00: Take a look at the top news of the week
block_03: Apple leads risk-on market rally. The share price climbed higher on Wednesday, adding as much as 4.1%. At the end of the trading day, the stock was still up 3.8%. Moreover, the news also broke that Apple was making a further push into the digital-advertising space, which could spell additional upside for the stock.
block_07: The company announced a Bitcoin partnership with BlackRock (​​the world’s largest money manager) amid crypto industry turmoil – the share price rose by 39% this week.
block_10: Italy is close to clinching a $5 billion deal with Intel for a chip factory. Even though the share price has fallen 8% this week, things can change at once.
